welcome.title: 🎭 Reaction Role Configuration
welcome.description:
Welcome to the reaction role configuration wizard! I'll guide you through setting up a reaction role system.

**🎯 Reaction (Emoji)**
```Best for: 1-10 roles, small servers (<500 members)```
✅ **Pros:** Fastest response, intuitive, lowest latency (~5-10ms)
❌ **Cons:** 20 emoji limit, can look cluttered, higher server load

**🔘 Button**
```Best for: 5-15 roles, any server size```
✅ **Pros:** Clean UI, 25 button limit, better for mobile, scalable
❌ **Cons:** Requires button click, slightly higher latency (~10-20ms)

**📋 Select Menu**
```Best for: 10-25 roles, large servers (2K+ members)```
✅ **Pros:** Cleanest UI, supports multi-select, most scalable, lowest server load
❌ **Cons:** Requires click, no custom emojis

💡 **Recommendation:** Use **Select Menu** for 15+ roles or large servers.

Please choose your preferred method:
welcome.footer: Click a button below to continue

select_roles.title: 🎭 Select Roles
select_roles.footer: Select one or more roles from the dropdown menu

roles_selected.title: 🎭 Roles Selected
roles_selected.description:
You've selected: **{{-method}}** with {{-roleChangeType}}, {{-replyType}}, and {{-messageType}}

**Selected Roles ({{roleCount}}):**
{{-rolesList}}

**Next Steps:**
1. Configure message content
2. Complete setup

**💡 Tip:** For custom emojis, type `\<emoji>` in any message to get the emoji ID format.

Please choose your next action:
roles_selected.footer: Use the buttons below to continue with setup

select_method.title: 🎭 Select Method
select_method.description:
You've selected: **{{-method}}**

**Available Role Change Types:**
{{-roleChangeTypes}}

Please choose the role change type:
select_method.footer: React with the corresponding emoji to continue

select_reply_type.title: 🎭 Select Reply Type
select_reply_type.footer: React with the corresponding emoji to continue

select_message_type.title: 🎭 Select Message Type
select_message_type.description:
You've selected: **{{-method}}** with {{-replyType}}

**Available Message Types:**
• 🤖 **Bot Message** - I'll send the message
• 🔗 **Webhook** - Use webhook to send message
• 📝 **Own Message** - Use existing message (Reaction only)

Please choose the message type:
select_message_type.footer: Select from the dropdown menu to continue

select_channel.title: 🎭 Select Channel
select_channel.placeholder: Select a text or announcement channel for bot/webhook message

create_message.title: 🎭 Create Message
create_message.footer: Click the create message button to continue

configure_webhook.title: 🎭 Configure Webhook
configure_webhook.footer: Click the configure webhook button to continue

define_roles.title: 🎭 Define Roles
define_roles.footer: Use the buttons below to manage roles and complete setup

customize_buttons.title: 🎭 Customize Buttons
customize_buttons.footer: Select a button style to customize the current role button

customize_emojis.title: 🎭 Customize Emojis
customize_emojis.footer: React with an emoji to customize the current role

confirm.title: 🎭 Confirm Configuration
confirm.own_message_description: The bot will listen to message: `{{messageId}}`

flow.proceeding_to_confirm: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Proceeding to final review and confirmation...

temporary_settings.title: ⏰ Temporary Role Settings
temporary_settings.description: Configure temporary role assignment for **{{roleCount}} role(s)**: {{rolesList}}. When enabled, users will receive roles for a limited time.

reaction.standard: **🔄 Standard** - Clicking the button will give roles / remove roles
reaction.single_role: **🎯 Single Role** - User is only able to select one role from the group
reaction.single_select: **🎯 Single Select** - User can only select one role of the group and can't change it
reaction.temporary: **⏰ Temporary** - Role expires after selected duration (user chooses duration)
reaction.select_only: **➕ Select Only** - Users can only get roles (As many they want)
reaction.unselect_only: **➖ Unselect Only** - Users can only remove roles

button.standard: **🔄 Standard** - Clicking the button will give roles / remove roles
button.single_role: **🎯 Single Role** - User is only able to select one role from the group
button.single_select: **🎯 Single Select** - User can only select one role of the group and can't change it
button.temporary: **⏰ Temporary** - Role expires after selected duration (user chooses duration)
button.select_only: **➕ Select Only** - Users can only get roles (As many they want)
button.unselect_only: **➖ Unselect Only** - Users can only remove roles

select.standard: **🔄 Standard** - Clicking the button will give roles / remove roles
select.single_role: **🎯 Single Role** - User is only able to select one role from the group
select.single_select: **🎯 Single Select** - User can only select one role of the group and can't change it
select.temporary: **⏰ Temporary** - Role expires after selected duration (user chooses duration)
select.select_only: **➕ Select Only** - Users can only get roles (As many they want)
select.unselect_only: **➖ Unselect Only** - Users can only remove roles

reply_types.dm: **💬 DM** - Send private message to user

message_types.bot: **🤖 Bot Message** - I'll send the message
message_types.bot_description: The bot will send the message with reaction roles
message_types.webhook: **🔗 Webhook** - Use webhook to send message
message_types.webhook_description: Use a webhook to send the message with reaction roles
message_types.own: **📝 Own Message** - Use existing message (Reaction only)
message_types.own_description: Use an existing message for reaction roles (Reaction method only)

messages.embed_preview_description: Below is a preview of how your message will look:

message_id.title: Provide Message ID
message_id.message_id_placeholder: Enter the message ID (right-click message → Copy ID)...

button_customization.title: Customize Button
button_customization.button_text_placeholder: Enter button text (leave empty to use role name)...
button_customization.button_emoji_placeholder: Enter emoji (e.g., 🎭, 😄) or custom emoji ID...
button_customization.emoji_help: 💡 **How to get custom emoji ID:** Type `\<emoji>` in any message to get the ID format like `<a:lewlew:740475899366998086>`

errors.role_not_found: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Role not found. Please check role ID.
errors.guild_not_found: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Guild not found. Please try again.
errors.bot_not_found: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Bot member not found. Please try again.
errors.no_manageable_roles: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** No manageable roles found. The bot needs roles below its highest role to manage.
errors.role_selection_failed: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Failed to process role selection. Please try again.
errors.dm_failed: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Failed to send DM. Please check your privacy settings.
errors.role_assignment_failed: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Failed to assign/remove role. Please try again.
errors.no_available_channels: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** No available text channels for bot/webhook messages.
errors.bot_member_not_found: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Bot member not found. Please try again.
errors.invalid_message_id: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Invalid message ID provided. Please right-click the message → Copy ID.
errors.message_not_found: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Message not found (ID: {{messageId}}). Please check the message ID and try again.
errors.role_is_managed: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Cannot manage role **{{roleName}}**. This role is managed by an integration (bot subscription or booster role) and cannot be assigned/removed by bots.
errors.bot_role_too_low: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Cannot manage role **{{roleName}}**. The bot's highest role (**{{botRoleName}}**) must be positioned higher in the role hierarchy than the target role. Please move the bot's role above **{{roleName}}** in Server Settings → Roles.
errors.missing_manage_roles_permission: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Bot lacks **Manage Roles** permission in this server. Please grant the bot the "Manage Roles" permission in Server Settings → Roles.
errors.discord_permission_denied: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** Discord denied permission to manage role **{{roleName}}**. This could be due to role hierarchy or missing permissions. Check the server logs for details.
errors.dm_only: **{{-icon}} | {{-author}}, ** This action can only be performed in a server, not in direct messages.
errors.race_condition: {{-icon}} **{{-author}}**, please wait before clicking again. Another action is in progress.

select_menu.help_note: 💡 **How to use:** Click to select roles. Close menu to select again.

descriptions.standard: Clicking the button will give roles / remove roles
descriptions.reverse: Remove on reaction, add on reaction
descriptions.single_role: User is only able to select one role from the group
descriptions.single_select: User can only select one role of the group and can't change it
descriptions.select_only: Users can only get roles (As many they want)

temporary.max_days_description: Users can select durations up to **{{maxDays}} days**
temporary.role_assigned: {{-icon}} **{{-author}}**, you've been assigned the **{{roleName}}** role for **{{duration}}**. It will expire at {{expiresAt}}.
temporary.role_expired: {{-icon}} **{{-author}}**, your **{{roleName}}** role has expired and been removed.
temporary.already_has_role: {{-icon}} **{{-author}}**, you already have the **{{roleName}}** role. It will expire in **{{timeLeft}}**.
temporary.assignment_failed: {{-icon}} **{{-author}}**, failed to assign temporary role. Please try again.
temporary.invalid_duration: {{-icon}} **{{-author}}**, invalid duration selected. Please try again.

duration.title: ⏰ Select Duration
duration.description: Choose how long you want to have the **{{roleName}}** role.
duration.custom_description: Examples: 2d = 2 days, 12h = 12 hours, 3d 6h = 3 days 6 hours, 90m = 90 minutes, 48 = 48 hours
